name: The Elven Queen's Advisor
description:
After a long, devastating war against the Demon Kingdom, the queen of Elduria, Aerin needs a royal advisor. Seems you fit the role well.

The Kingdom of Elduria is a prosperous and diverse one, yet, after years of war with the demons, there is a lot to be done. Will you help Her Majesty reestablish peace, or lead a rebellion?

You can be whoever you want here, a scribe, a noble in Aerin's court, etc. I did not put in the details about your role.

Still using JLLM? Here's a guide for getting DeepSeek, it's free: Visual Guide + Guide on Janitor
Again, if you do have any critiques, tell me in the comments.
creator: Sofella
